---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill, a new feature for an existing skill, or an enhancement to the reference library.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: psenger
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!--
Describe the situation that motivates this request. What can you not currently do?
A clear problem statement makes a feature request 10x easier to evaluate.
-->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you like the project to do? Be as specific as you can — exact phrasing, exact filenames, exact behavior. -->

## Which skill (or new skill)?

<!--
catholic-advisor / catholic-advisor-setup / youth-communication-coach / a new skill / not sure
If proposing a new skill, briefly state its scope and which existing skills it would NOT overlap.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else have you tried or thought about? Why didn't those alternatives work? -->

## Catholic / theological grounding (if applicable)

<!--
If the request involves doctrine, devotion, or Catholic practice, cite the relevant Catechism paragraphs, Scripture passages, or Magisterial documents that motivate it.
Example:
  - "Add an entry for Bl. Solanus Casey because CCC 1717 lists humility as a Beatitude virtue and there is currently no modern American saint exemplifying it in references/."
-->

## Additional context

<!-- Examples, mockups, related discussions, related issues, etc. -->
